textbook: PEP Primary English Book Grade 5 Volume 2

unit_test.title: Unit 1 My day - Basic Skills Test

questions.question: 'eat breakfast' 的意思是吃早餐。
questions.explanation: eat breakfast是吃早餐的固定搭配。

questions.question: 'do morning exercises' 的意思是晨练或做早操。
questions.explanation: do morning exercises 意为做早操。

questions.question: 单词 'busy' 的意思是忙碌的。
questions.explanation: busy是形容词，表示忙的。

questions.question: 'sometimes' 放在句中，意思是‘总是’。
questions.explanation: sometimes 是‘有时’，总是是 always。

questions.question: 在描述时间点前，通常使用介词 'at'。
questions.explanation: 时间点前常用 at，如 at 7:00。

questions.question: I often _____ basketball on the weekend.
questions.explanation: often提示用一般现在时，主语I用动词原形。

questions.question: When _____ you get up?
questions.explanation: 主语是you，助动词用do。

questions.question: What do you _____ do on Sundays?
questions.explanation: 问经常做的事情，通常用频度副词usually。

questions.question: It's 12 o'clock. It's time to eat _____.
questions.explanation: 12点通常是吃午饭（lunch）的时间。

questions.question: Which word has the /kl/ sound?
questions.explanation: clean中的cl发/kl/音。

questions.question: I always _____ my room on Saturday.
questions.explanation: 打扫房间用clean my room。

questions.question: I take a dancing _____ on Saturdays.
questions.explanation: take a class 意为上课。

questions.question: Zhang Peng _____ plays sports.
questions.explanation: 句意表达频度，需要频度副词。

questions.question: —When do you eat dinner? —_____ 7:00 p.m.
questions.explanation: 具体几点钟前面用at。

questions.question: I often _____ shopping with my mum.
questions.explanation: go shopping 是固定搭配。

questions.question: I eat _____ at 7:00 in the morning.
questions.explanation: 早上7点通常吃早餐。

questions.question: I usually go for a _____ with my father.
questions.explanation: go for a walk 意为去散步。

questions.question: _____ do you finish class in Spain?
questions.explanation: 询问时间用疑问词when。

questions.question: I play _____ with my friends at 4:30.
questions.explanation: play sports 是本单元核心词组，意为体育运动。

questions.question: 请将下列英语短语与其对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: get up-起床, brush teeth-刷牙, play sports-进行体育活动, clean my room-打扫我的房间。

questions.question: 请将频度副词与其中文释义及对应特征连线。
questions.explanation: always-总是, usually-通常, often-经常, sometimes-有时。

questions.question: 连词成句：do, get, When, you, up, ?
questions.explanation: 疑问词+do+主语+动词原形+其他？

questions.question: 连词成句：I, breakfast, at, 7:00, eat, .
questions.explanation: 主语+谓语+宾语+时间状语。

exam.title: Grade 5 Second Term English Mid-term Exam (Unit 1)

questions.question: In English, 'have dinner' and 'eat dinner' have the same meaning.
questions.explanation: have 和 eat 在表示进餐时可以互换。

questions.question: The word 'usually' means you do something 100% of the time.
questions.explanation: 100%通常是always, usually大约是80%。

questions.question: The 'pl' in 'plate' and 'player' sounds the same.
questions.explanation: 都发/pl/音。

questions.question: We say 'on the morning' to talk about daily activities.
questions.explanation: 应该用 'in the morning'。

questions.question: 'shopping' is the correct spelling for 购物.
questions.explanation: 拼写正确。

questions.question: I often _____ morning exercises.
questions.explanation: 主语是第一人称，一般现在时谓语动词用原形。

questions.question: _____ do you go to bed?
questions.explanation: 询问时间用 When。

questions.question: I _____ play football, but not very often.
questions.explanation: but not very often 提示频率不高，所以选 sometimes。

questions.question: I often go _____ on the weekend.
questions.explanation: go shopping 是习惯表达。

questions.question: I eat lunch _____ school.
questions.explanation: 在学校用 at school。

questions.knowledge_point: 字母组合cl和pl的发音规律
questions.question: Find the odd one out (找出发音不同的一项).
questions.explanation: 前三个是cl发音，play是pl发音。

questions.question: When do you _____ back to school?
questions.explanation: 助动词do后面接动词原形。

questions.question: The police officer works _____ night.
questions.explanation: at night 是固定搭配。

questions.question: We _____ have a robot. He is helpful.
questions.explanation: also 意为‘也’，常放在实义动词前。

questions.question: That's _____ late!
questions.explanation: too late 表示‘太晚了’。

questions.question: I eat _____ at 6:00 p.m.
questions.explanation: 傍晚通常吃晚餐。

questions.question: —What do you do on the _____? —I often clean my room.
questions.explanation: 常问周末（weekend）做什么。

questions.question: I usually do _____ exercises at 8:30 a.m.
questions.explanation: 动词短语为 do morning exercises。

questions.question: I _____ watch TV. (频率100%)
questions.explanation: 100%频率用always。

questions.question: 中英文句子对应关系连线。
questions.explanation: A对2(去散步)，B对1(上课)，C对4(吃晚饭)，D对3(洗衣服)。

questions.question: 单词拼写与意思对应。
questions.explanation: A-busy(2忙)，B-often(1经常)，C-class(4课)，D-when(3什么时候)。

questions.question: 连词成句：I, always, up, get, early, .
questions.explanation: 频度副词放在实义动词之前。

questions.question: 连词成句：When, finish, you, class, do, ?
questions.explanation: 特殊疑问句语序：疑问词+do+主语+动词原形+其他。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 描述一天的活动，如 get up, eat breakfast, play sports, clean my room。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 动词原形 + 宾语 (如: eat + dinner)
common_mistakes: 容易混淆 eat breakfast 和 eat dinner
忘记 do morning exercises 中的 exercises 是复数
knowledge_summary.tips: 记忆短语时结合身体动作，形成肌肉记忆。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 表示动作发生的频率，常见的有 always, usually, often, sometimes。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 主语 + 频度副词 + 动词 (如: I usually get up at 6:00)
common_mistakes: always 和 usually 频率等级混淆
knowledge_summary.tips: 可以将频率从100%到20%排列：always > usually > often > sometimes。

knowledge_summary.point: 询问作息的 When 句型
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 询问对方在什么时间做某事。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: When do you + 动词原形 + 其他? 回答：I ... at ...
common_mistakes: 回答时间时漏掉介词 at
疑问词 when 写成 what
knowledge_summary.tips: 见到 When 开头的问句，答案里一定要找表示时间的词和 at。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 辨析 cl 发音为 /kl/，pl 发音为 /pl/。
common_mistakes: 发音不清晰，混淆 [k] 和 [p]
knowledge_summary.tips: 多读含有这组字母组合的单词，如 clean, clock (cl) 和 play, plate (pl)。
